(sub-sim
          (begin
            (define candidates (filter (lambda (r) (> (nth r 1) 10)) my-relationships))
            (define best (if (empty? candidates) my-id (nth (car candidates) 0)))

diary_entries.entry: Another year. Subsurface ice deposit found. The colony feels hopeful. My resolve grows stronger.
Year 73 on Mars. Subsurface ice deposit found. Morale is hopeful. We have 123 food units left.
Year 73 on Mars. Subsurface ice deposit found. Morale is hopeful. We have 123 food units left.

meta_awareness: Phobos (year 73): 'If I can spawn a sub-simulation to test governance, who spawned the simulation I live in to test THEIR governance?'
